round3: Round three saw everyone jump on the Oilers bandwagon, with Marc being the only one sharp enough to nail the game count. Meanwhile, those of you who still think Buffalo can win a playoff series were sorely disappointed, watching Carolina skate right past your picks in seven games.
round1: Round 1 is over and the only unanimous decision here was that everyone was wrong about Calgary. While Jaclyn and Stephanie are likely still mourning their Red Wings, Derrick somehow managed to pick four perfect series, leaving the rest of you looking like you filled out your brackets with a dartboard.
round2: Round 2 is in the books, and it appears most of you are still picking teams with your eyes closed. Ottawa and New Jersey were popular picks to advance, which means you're almost universally off to a terrible start, especially those who thought Colorado would actually win a game against Anaheim. At least Marc and Derrick actually watched the Oilers, which is more than can be said for anyone else's crystal ball.
round4: Congratulations to absolutely no one. Every single one of you picked the Oilers to win the Cup, proving once again that family loyalty trumps hockey knowledge. Maybe next time try picking the team that actually wins, or at least the right series length.
overall: Well, the Carolina Hurricanes somehow managed to lift the Cup, bringing this whole charade to a close. Derrick, our undisputed pool champion, absolutely smoked the competition with 45 points, correctly picking 10 teams and somehow nailing 6 game totals – a truly dominant performance given the general ineptitude displayed. Marc put up a respectable fight, just three points behind, while Chrissy's nine team picks only yielded three correct game totals, a testament to her unique strategy of picking everyone and everything. However, the real standout, or rather sit-down, was Stephanie, our undisputed pool loser, who managed a pathetic 21 points and a measly two correct game totals despite also picking nine teams. Frankly, some people should just stick to watching the commercials.
